name: The Hartley
researchNote: No property called 'The Hartley at Pike & Rose' exists. The Pike & Rose development in North Bethesda (Federal Realty) contains PerSei, The Henri, and Pallas/Bell at the Pike, none of them named Hartley. The only 'The Hartley' found in the DC metro area is at 7150 12th St NW, Washington DC 20012, part of the Parks at Walter Reed redevelopment in the Shepherd Park / Takoma neighborhood. This file documents that property. If the user encountered 'The Hartley at Pike & Rose' as a listing, the address should be verified. It may be a misattribution or placeholder on a third-party site.
neighborhood: Shepherd Park / Takoma, Washington DC (Parks at Walter Reed development)
buildingNotes: 323-unit rental apartment and townhome community. Six-story structure (five stories wood over one-story concrete podium). Part of the 66-acre Parks at Walter Reed redevelopment. LEED Silver certified. Completed January 2023. Developer/builder: CBG Building Company. Not a condo building.
doormanNotes: Concierge lobby confirmed with ButterflyMX smart entry system. Hours not stated on website or in any reviewed source. 'Concierge services' listed as an amenity but no explicit 24-hour staffing claim found.
elevatorNotes: Six-story building; elevator not explicitly mentioned in any source reviewed. Smart/keyless entry confirmed. Presence can be inferred from building height but not confirmed from public sources.
unitTypeNotes: Studio, 1BR, 2BR, 3BR apartments, plus 2BR townhomes. Website floor plan page also lists 1BR+den options (labeled ad1-den, ad3-den, ad4-den, ad5-den, ad6-den).
balconyNotes: Private balconies or terraces in most (not all) homes per official amenity page.
inUnitLaundryNotes: Full-size in-home washer and dryer in all units.
petFriendlyNotes: Cats and dogs allowed, limit 2 per apartment. Monthly pet rent $75/animal. Restricted breeds include pit bulls, rottweilers, akitas, and others. On-site pet spa.
poolNotes: Resort-style pool with cabanas and lounge seating in landscaped interior courtyard.
gymNotes: Fitness center with yoga studio and outdoor workout zone.
packageRoomNotes: Secure package room confirmed; rentable storage units also available.
unitClimateNotes: Smart thermostats in every unit; air conditioning listed as an in-unit amenity. Residents control their own climate.
wellMaintainedNotes: Building opened 2023 so relatively new. RentCafe maintenance score 4.5/5 from a large review base. Reviews note clean building and responsive maintenance team. One review mentioned a flood incident. Overall condition reads as well-maintained for a building of this age.
bathroomsNote: Most 2BR units have 2 baths (floor plans B7, B10, 2BD1, TH1, TH2); at least one 2BR floor plan (B0) has 1 bath. Expect 2 baths in the majority of 2BR layouts.
approxRentRange: 2BR: approximately $2,782-$4,102/month (as of mid-2026, before any concessions). Concessions active: up to 2 months free base rent on select units with move-in by 6/30/2026. Overall building range studio-3BR: ~$1,765-$4,087/month.
retailOnSite: Whole Foods Market, Starbucks, Jinya Ramen Bar, Charmery Ice Cream, nail salon.
